title: Sweeney Todd a musical of love and vengeance
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - A gothic masterpiece, a tale of love, loss and vengeance served with a deliciously sinister twist, will hit the George Arts Theatre from 29 October to 8 November.


> Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street is a wickedly entertaining musical masterpiece by Stephen Sondheim.


This chilling tale follows the vengeful barber Sweeney Todd who returns to London after years of wrongful exile only to discover a city filled with corruption and cruelty.

With the cunning pie-maker Mrs Lovett as his unlikely accomplice, Todd sets out on a path of bloody revenge, resulting in one of the most macabre and unforgettable stories ever told on stage.

Evening performances start at 19:00, with matinees on both Saturdays at 14:00.

Tickets are R150 for the public and R120 for theatre members, available through the George Arts Theatre box office and online booking platforms.


> Video: Group Editors gets a taste of Sweeney Todd: A killer chat about pies & revenge.


Christopher Petrie as Sweeney Todd and Megan Loots as Mrs Lovett.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
